title: Low Simulation Distance
description: Sets minimum simulation and render distance into 1
body:
# Low Simulation Distance

Sets minimum simulation and render distance into 1.

![Video Settings with 1 chunk of both Render Distance and Simulation Distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66899101643c11a6a8f18f9fcdf6e9927f7141fd.png)

### "Can I use this mod?"

If you have an extremely low end device, then this mod is for you! Although it is not recommended for normal gameplay if you would like to set both simulation and render distance into 1.
